title: Rhees-Verk breathing
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rhees-Verk Breathing''' was the medical term used to describe a form of syncopated breathing rhythm that sometimes caused ventricular fibrillation in the [[Heart/Legends|heart]] of a being.

It was especially dangerous for races like the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]], which had multiple hearts that needed to operate synchronously.

==Appearances==
